title: selliguea taeniata var. angustata
intro: Selliguea taeniata var. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved Selaginella, is a type of fern-like plant commonly found in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. In traditional herbal preparations, Selliguea taeniata var. angustata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
